LightningComponentBundle.description: Configurable related list with inline edit, colour coding, search, and CSV export.

property.name: title
property.label: Card Title
property.description: Header label for the card (e.g. Contacts).

property.name: childObjectApiName
property.label: Child Object API Name
property.description: API name of the child object to query (e.g. Contact).

property.name: parentFieldApiName
property.label: Parent Lookup Field
property.description: Lookup field on the child that relates to the parent record (e.g. AccountId).

property.name: fieldsToDisplay
property.label: Fields to Display
property.description: Comma-separated field API names to show as columns (e.g. Name,Email,Phone).

property.name: sortableFields
property.label: Sortable Fields
property.description: Comma-separated field API names that should be sortable.

property.name: enableSearch
property.label: Enable Search
property.description: Show a search bar above the table.

property.name: enableInlineEdit
property.label: Enable Inline Edit
property.description: Allow inline cell editing with a Save All button.

property.name: colorField
property.label: Color Field
property.description: API name of a text/picklist field used to drive row colour coding.

property.name: colorRules
property.label: Color Rules (JSON)
property.description: JSON mapping field values to colour tokens e.g. {"Hot":"red","Warm":"orange","Cold":"blue"}.

property.name: primaryActionLabel
property.label: Primary Action Label
property.description: Label for row-level primary action button (e.g. Edit).

property.name: enableNewRecord
property.label: Enable New Record
property.description: Show a New button to create a child record.
